title: daphne fargesii
intro: Daphne fargesii, a perennial shrub native to China, belongs to the family Thymelaeaceae and is commonly known as the 'Farges' or 'Chinese daphne'. Traditionally, Daphne fargesii has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Daphne fargesii is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
